title Container diagram

System_Ext(email_system, "E-Mail System", "The internal Microsoft Exchange system")
Person(customer, Customer, "A customer of the bank, with personal bank accounts")

Container_Boundary(c1, "Internet Banking") {
    Container(spa, "Single-Page App", "JavaScript, Angular", "Provides all the Internet banking functionality to customers via their web browser")
}

Rel(customer, spa, "Uses", "HTTPS")
reason: C4Container 类型：带边界的最小容器级图，稳定但专业化。

input:
sankey-beta

sourceNode,targetNode,10
reason: sankey 类型：最小流图，但使用 d3-sankey 迭代布局可能因浮点坐标引入像素舍入不确定性。

input:
block-beta
columns 2
block
  id2["I am a wide one"]
  id1
end
id["Next row"]
reason: block 类型：最小块图，但为较新实验性外部图表带自有布局求解器，确定性待验证。

input:
architecture-beta
  group api(cloud)[API]

  service db(database)[Database] in api
  service server(server)[Server] in api
  service gateway(internet)[Gateway]

  db:L -- R:server
  server:T -- B:gateway
reason: architecture 类型：最小架构图（已去图标包），但实验性；自定义图标需网络 fetch 离线渲染回退到占位符。

input:
packet
title Hello world
0-10: "hello"
reason: packet 类型：最小数据包结构，但为较新实验性外部图表，支持矩阵未知。

input:
sequenceDiagram
  participant A
  participant B
  A<<->>B: Duplex async
  A<<-->>B: Duplex async dotted
  A->>B: Async
  A-->>B: Async dotted
  A->B: Solid
  A-->B: Dotted
  A-x B: Cross
  A--x B: Cross dotted
  A-) B: Open
  A--) B: Open dotted
reason: 单文件覆盖 8+ 种序列箭头变体（双工/异步/开放/十字），现有清单仅含 ->>/-->>。

input:
sequenceDiagram
  box LightBlue System A
    participant A1
    participant A2
  end
  box LightGreen System B
    participant B1
    participant B2
  end
  A1->>B1: Sync
  A2-->>B2: Async
reason: box ... end 参与者分组语法，清单中完全缺失。

input:
stateDiagram-v2
  state Composite {
    [*] --> S1
    S1 --> [H]
    [H*] --> S2
  }
  [*] --> Composite
  Composite --> [*]
reason: [H]/[H*] 历史伪状态标记 + 复合状态，清单中未覆盖。

input:
pie showData
  title Key elements in Product X
  "Calcium" : 42.96
  "Potassium" : 50.05
  "Magnesium" : 10.01
  "Iron" : 5

input:
classDiagram
class Order
note for Order "Domain aggregate"
class Customer
note for Customer "Preferred"
reason: note for <Class> 单行类注释（v2 语法），清单中无类注释覆盖。

input:
erDiagram
  USER ||..o{ LOG_ENTRY : generates
  USER ||..o{ SESSION : opens
reason: ||..o{ 虚线（非标识）ER 关系语法，现有 ER 候选仅用实线 ||--。

input:
sequenceDiagram
  A->>B: Solid arrow (sync)
  B-->>A: Dashed arrow (return)
  A-)B: Open arrow (async)
  B--)A: Open dashed arrow
reason: -)/--) 开放异步箭头类型，现有序列候选仅 ->>/-->>。

input:
sequenceDiagram
  participant A as App
  participant DB as Database
  A->>DB: BEGIN
  critical Transaction
    A->>DB: UPDATE accounts
    A->>DB: INSERT log
  end
  A->>DB: COMMIT
reason: critical ... end 交互框架，清单中完全缺失（仅有 alt/opt/par/loop）。

input:
graph TD
  A[Normal]:::default --> B[Highlighted]:::highlight --> C[Error]:::error
  classDef default fill:#f4f4f5,stroke:#a1a1aa
  classDef highlight fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706
  classDef error fill:#ef4444,stroke:#dc2626
reason: ::: 内联类绑定简写语法，现有清单仅覆盖 class A someclass 语句形式。

组合边变体（<-.-> 双向、<-- label ---> 带标签双向、加长 ---->/======>），现有候选未覆盖。

input:
flowchart
  a --> b
  b --> c
  b --> d
  c --> a
  a --> b
  a --> b
  b --> a

input:
graph TB
subgraph some-id[Some Title]
	a1-->a2
end
reason: subgraph id[Title] 记法（id 与显示标题分离），现有子图候选仅用 label[Title]。

input:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Alice
  participant Bob
  opt Outer
    alt Command A
      Alice->>Bob: Request A
    else Command B
      Alice->>Bob: Request B
    end
  end
reason: opt 控制片段（4 个核心片段中唯一缺失），并与 alt 嵌套增加语法广度。

input:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Alice
  participant Bob
  participant John
  Alice->>Bob: Hello
  Note over Alice,Bob: Spanning note
  Bob->>John: Hi
  Note over Alice,John: Full span
reason: Note over A,B 跨参与者注释，现有清单仅覆盖 Note left of/right of 单参与者注释。

input:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Off
  Off --> On
  state MyChoice [[choice]]
  On --> MyChoice
  MyChoice --> Washing
  MyChoice --> Drying
  Washing --> Finished
  Finished --> [*]
reason: [[choice]] 伪状态决策节点（v2 独有语法），清单中无任何候选覆盖。

input:
stateDiagram-v2
  state fork_state <<fork>>
  [*] --> fork_state
  fork_state --> State2
  fork_state --> State3
  state join_state <<join>>
  State2 --> join_state
  State3 --> join_state
  join_state --> State4
  State4 --> [*]
reason: <<fork>>/<<join>> 伪状态关键字语法（区别于 mm-st-006 的 -- 并发分隔形式）。

  Class01 : int gorilla

  class Class10~T~ {
    <<service>>
    int id
    test()

input:
erDiagram
  T1 one or zero to one or more T2 : test
  T2 one or many optionally to zero or one T3 : test
  T3 zero or more to zero or many T4 : test
  T6 only one optionally to only one T1 : test
  T4 0+ to 1+ T6 : test
reason: 英文单词基数短语 + 0+/1+ 简写形式，独立解析分支，语法独特但偏冷门，归 useful_later。
属性行内 "注释" 字符串 + 虚线 }|..|{ 关系，现有 ER 候选有 PK/FK 但无属性注释。

input:

  axisFormat  %d/%m
  title Adding GANTT diagram to mermaid
  excludes weekdays 2014-01-10
  todayMarker off
  section team's critical event
  deadline A           :milestone, crit, deadlineA, 2024-02-01, 0
  deadline B           :milestone, crit, deadlineB, 2024-02-15, 0
